title: Sweep Angle ( SweepAngle)
text: Sweep Angle ( SweepAngle) Positive or negative distance that the meter scale travels from its starting point, expressed in degrees. Values can be integer or floating point numbers. A negative value indicates reverse sweeping. Default is 180 . SweepAngle = " Number " Example: Setting in ProcScript $fieldproperties = "startangle=220;sweepangle=250" Copy Figure 1. Meter Start and Sweep Angles Applies To umeter (Meter) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
